name: Prataap Snacks Limited
summary: Prataap Snacks Limited manufactures and sells snack foods in India and internationally. The company's products include extruded snacks, potato chips, pellet snacks, nachos, namkeens, and popcorns under the Yellow Diamond brand name. It also offers namkeens and fryums under the Avadha brand; and yum-pie, yum-cake, cookie-cake, and choco vanilla cake snacks under the Rich Feast brand. The company offers its products through distributors, stockists, and retail stores. Prataap Snacks Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Indore, India.
